# GitlabSource class

Namespace: [`Velopack.Sources`](./index.md)

Retrieves available releases from a GitLab repository. This class only
downloads assets from the very latest GitLab release.

```cs
public class GitlabSource : GitBase<GitlabRelease>, IUpdateSource
```

**Inherits:** `GitBase<GitlabRelease>`  
**Implements:** [`IUpdateSource`](./IUpdateSource.md)

### GitlabSource(repoUrl, accessToken, upcomingRelease, downloader) {#gitlabsource-string-string-bool-ifiledownloader}

```cs
public GitlabSource(string repoUrl, string accessToken, bool upcomingRelease, IFileDownloader? downloader = null)
```

Retrieves available releases from a GitLab repository. This class only
downloads assets from the very latest GitLab release.

**Parameters**

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `repoUrl` | `string` | The URL of the GitLab repository to download releases from <br/>(e.g. https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/ProjectId) |
| `accessToken` | `string` | The GitLab access token to use with the request to download releases. |
| `upcomingRelease` | `bool` | If true, the latest upcoming release will be downloaded. If false, the latest <br/>stable release will be downloaded. |
| `downloader` | [`IFileDownloader`](./IFileDownloader.md) | The file downloader used to perform HTTP requests. |

### GetAssetUrlFromName(release, assetName) {#getasseturlfromname-gitlabrelease-string}

```cs
protected override string GetAssetUrlFromName(GitlabRelease release, string assetName)
```

Given a [`GitlabRelease`](./GitlabRelease.md) and an asset filename (eg. 'RELEASES') this 
function will return either `DirectAssetUrl` or
`Url`, depending whether an access token is available
or not. Throws if the specified release has no matching assets.

**Parameters**

| Name | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `release` | [`GitlabRelease`](./GitlabRelease.md) |  |
| `assetName` | `string` |  |


**Returns** `string`
